english: What is the primary concern of the reservation policy debate in India?
hindi: भारत में आरक्षण नीति विवाद का मुख्य चिंता क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் ஒதுக்கீட்டு நிதியம் பற்றிய விவாதத்தின் முக்கிய கவலை எது?
vietnamese: Nhu cầu chính của cuộc tranh luận về chính sách dự phòng ở Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: Social equality and representation of historically marginalized communities
expected_failure: why the AI model may struggle with nuances of cultural and social context
